caption: A man wearing a long-sleeved blue shirt is playing a digital keyboard in a music studio with dark purple curtains in the background. He is positioned behind a microphone on a boom arm, with an acoustic guitar resting on a stand to his left. On the equipment and surfaces around him are small plush toys, including a red character and a pink one. The white text "Head to the next part for more Arpeggios" is displayed at the top of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man initially looks down while playing the keys with both hands. In the final moments, he stops playing and looks directly toward the camera, gesturing with his arms as he speaks into the microphone.
